RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT WALTER ROSENKRANZ' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS DENIED; DEFENDANT HAS ESTABLISHED NEITHER EXCUSABLE NEGLECT NOR REASONABLE DILIGENCE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 (301/PJB)
